items.title: Why big pharma is teaming up with AI giants to speed up drug discovery and make work easier for health care workers
items.description: Eli Lilly and J&J recently announced partnerships with AI chipmaker Nvidia, pointing to a broader trend of tie-ups to advance drug discovery and improve workflows.

items.title: Merck Stock Rise as New PAH Drug Winrevair Meets Goal in Another Study
items.description: MRK's Winrevair hits its phase II goal in patients with CpcPH tied to HFpEF, setting up phase III plans and a potential path to broader use. Stock up.
